message:
Fix rand_like/randn_like to use source tensor shape and add negative index support in gather backward

- Rewrite rand_like() and randn_like() to read the source tensor's
  shape and generate random values inline instead of delegating to
  rand()/randn(), which would create a new tensor with a potentially
  different shape if the session's default shape differed
- Add negative index wrapping in gather backward pass (index_select and
  index-based gather) so that indices like -1 correctly map to the last
  element along the dimension, matching PyTorch's negative indexing
  semantics

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
